title: tricalysia elliottii var. centrafricana
intro: Tricalysia elliottii var. centrafricana is a variety of the Tricalysia elliottii plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Tricalysia elliottii var. centrafricana include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat infections and promote wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine in Africa, where it is considered a valuable resource for treating a range of health problems.
